description: A modern e-commerce website for a UK custom print and workwear business.
design_principles: Build 4 Theme Variations on a single showcase page.
Show all 4 on the same page with a clear label above each one and a 'Select This Theme' button under each.
Inner pages (Workwear, Teams/Schools, Design Your Own, Contact) strictly use the default Theme 1 (Industrial Dark).
No overused Inter font for headings; strictly follow assigned distinct typography.
Include data-testid attributes on all interactive elements.

theme_1_industrial_dark.name: Industrial Dark

button_styles.base: bg-[#ff6b35] text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 active:translate-y-0
button_styles.outline: border-2 border-[#ff6b35] text-[#ff6b35] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[#ff6b35] hover:text-white transition-colors

theme_1_industrial_dark.hero_treatment: Full-width dark background image with heavy black overlay (bg-black/60). Giant uppercase Oswald typography, left-aligned, stacked tightly. Diagonal slash accent overlaying the bottom edge.
theme_1_industrial_dark.category_grid_treatment: Bold, sharp-edged rectangular tiles. High contrast, dark overlays with bright orange text on hover. Grid items use tight gaps (gap-4).

theme_2_clean_professional.name: Clean Professional

button_styles.base: bg-[#0066ff] text-white font-semibold rounded-md px-6 py-3 shadow-sm hover:bg-[#0052cc] hover:shadow transition-all
button_styles.outline: border border-[#0066ff] text-[#0066ff] font-semibold rounded-md px-6 py-3 hover:bg-blue-50 transition-colors

theme_2_clean_professional.hero_treatment: Clean split layout: text on left, crisp product image on right. White background. Trust-centric messaging with structured, legible Plus Jakarta Sans headings.
theme_2_clean_professional.category_grid_treatment: Minimal card-based design with subtle shadows (shadow-sm). Lots of whitespace (p-6). Images are clean, deeply professional, un-cluttered.

theme_3_bold_bright.name: Bold & Bright

button_styles.base: bg-[#7bc67e] text-[#1a1a1a] font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-4 shadow-md hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform
button_styles.outline: border-2 border-[#7bc67e] text-[#333333] font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[#f0fdf4] transition-colors

theme_3_bold_bright.hero_treatment: Bright white background, massive friendly rounded headings. Floating colorful blobs or soft organic shapes behind the hero images. Very approachable.
theme_3_bold_bright.category_grid_treatment: Big colourful category tiles with heavy rounded corners (rounded-2xl). Images fill the cards entirely with a gentle gradient overlay and bold, friendly text centered.

theme_4_premium_dark.name: Premium Dark

button_styles.base: bg-[#c9a84c] text-[#1e1e2e] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[#b08f3a] transition-colors
button_styles.outline: border border-[#c9a84c] text-[#c9a84c] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[#c9a84c]/10 transition-colors

theme_4_premium_dark.hero_treatment: Deep charcoal background with a high-end, cinematic hero image smoothly fading into the dark. Elegant Cormorant Garamond headings with extremely wide tracking. Subtle, slow zoom animations.
theme_4_premium_dark.category_grid_treatment: Refined spacing. Images are monochromatic or desaturated until hovered, when full color elegantly fades in. Thin gold borders on hover.

hero.h1: Your Brand. Your Clothing. Your Own Print.
hero.subheadline: No minimums. No setup fees. Free logo design. UK based.

inner_pages.workwear_category: Product grid for Workwear, built using Theme 1.
inner_pages.teams_schools_category: Product grid for Teams & Schools, built using Theme 1.

layout.center_canvas: White t-shirt mockup area. Drag/resize/rotate functionality.

inner_pages.contact: Contact/Get a Quote form page built using Theme 1.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, designer tools, theme selectors) MUST include data-testid. Example: data-testid='theme-1-select-button'.
